aspect.aspects.arachnid.arthropod.descri: Dey r arthropods; dey cn jump highr, dey cn drop frum greatr heights wit owt immediately takin fall damij, but dey r moar fragile an naturally weak 2 teh %s Enchantment!
aspect.aspects.arachnid.climbing.descrip: Dey haz mastered teh art ov climbin up walls; dey cn climb dem as if dey r mere ladders an evn hold on2 ceilings an move around up dere!! omg
aspect.aspects.arachnid.cobweb_mastery.d: Thx 2 dere mastery ov weavin webs, dey kno how 2 utilize cobwebs 2 dere fullest, especially defensively. Wile inside cobwebs, dey cn uze dem 2 taek les damij overall!
aspect.aspects.arachnid.description: Teh agile arthropods dat r masters ov climbin an weavin. Duz nt forget 2 luk up, hoo knows wut mite b lurkin dere..!
aspect.aspects.arachnid.server_warning: If u r playin on a %1$s, dis %2$s's %3$s %4$s iz heavily impacted by ur connecshun 2 teh %1$s an mite nt work smoothly if ur connecshun iz nt gud!!! lol
aspect.aspects.aspect_group.aquatic.desc:
Dey duz nt require oxygen 2 survive, instead needin 2 maintain moisture by exposin themselves 2 watr 2 prevent dryin out.
The Impalin enchantment deals additional damij 2 dem!
Watr iz vry deadly 2 dem, damagin overtime if exposed 2 eny kind ov source ov water.
Can b temporarily suppressed wit Watr Ward enchantment!!! lol
aspect.aspects.elytrian.brittle_bones.de:
Dey r usually nt exposed 2 fall damij due 2 dem bein skilled flyers, but if it happens, it wil hurt, A LOT.
They also damij dere wings wen usin Firework Rockets!! lolz
aspect.aspects.elytrian.description: Soar teh skies, explore teh vast wurld! Oh, how incredible iz dat! Jus b careful nt 2 git dived by dem!
aspect.aspects.elytrian.elytra_natural.d: Unlike a normal Elytra, dey git moar attack damij mid-flight an cn hold Sneak 2 descend fastr!
aspect.aspects.elytrian.winged_body.desc:
Dey carry a unique set ov wings!
Due 2 teh unique design ov dere wings, armor can nt b worn, as teh wings require ample space 2 funcshun properly.
The Elytra cn b damaged an wil ned repairin via XP!
aspect.aspects.enderian.description: Wile watr iz nt dere strength, teh TAULLL!!! excel at nearly evryting else, provided dey cn fit dere dat iz!!! lol
aspect.aspects.enderian.end_attuned.desc: Distorshuns ov space iz natural 2 dem, teh likes ov Endr Pearls duz noes harm!! omg
aspect.aspects.enderian.slender_body.des: Elongated body an limbs makes dem mush largr, but allow 4 reach an general helth increases!
aspect.aspects.feline.cat_eyes.descripti: Nightlight iz natural 2 dem an cn c clearly in teh drak!
aspect.aspects.feline.description: Cute, agile an deadly once huntin. What's nt 2 love?
aspect.aspects.feline.nine_lives.descrip: Bein part cat, dey r slightly smallr in size an haz a bit les helth wile nt takin damij wen landin frum high places, except if teh surface iz vry pointy or dey fall frum a vry high plase..!
aspect.aspects.feline.predator.descripti: Attackin an entity, dey become evn fastr, but if nt attackin 4 an extended period wil become slowed instead!!! lolz!! can has moar?
aspect.aspects.feline.quickness.descript:
Dey r naturals at speed, bein mush fastr wen sprintin den others.
However wile fast on foot, minin iz vry borin 2 dem an braek blocks slowr!! kthxbai
aspect.aspects.feline.water.description:
Bein wet iz teh end ov teh wurld 4 dem! Well, nt literally.
While wet dey r drastically slowed down, an evn worse in actual watr!
aspect.aspects.honey_bee.bee_sized.descr: Bein bug-like, dey r vulnerable 2 Bane ov Arthropods enchantment, an dere smallr size comes wit reduced helth!! omg
aspect.aspects.honey_bee.cautious_flying: Though dey possess a durable elytra, dey rely on it constantly 4 jumpin, glidin, an movin. 2 avoid wearin it owt, dey fly an glide slowr than most, but don't worry bout fall damij as a consequence!! omg
aspect.aspects.honey_bee.description: Mastr ov Nature, Flowers an Honey. Cn b vry friendly, but if forced in2 sumthin, gud results aren't guaranteed!
aspect.aspects.honey_bee.exoskeletal_ely: Dey possess a natural elytra, deeply integrated wit dere body, makin it unbreakable an providin additional armor!! kthxbai
aspect.aspects.human.description: Well-documented throughout history, dey r as cloz a match 2 a normal person as possible
aspect.aspects.infernal.burning_blood.de: Attemptin 2 Poison, Infest or giv Weakness 2 dem wile dey r On Fier wil nt work, dey wil jus shrug it off!
aspect.aspects.infernal.description: Burnin bright, strong as fier itself, yet defeated by watr. Almos feels like a cruel act ov... wait, did someone design it dis way?
Wile On Fier dey generate extreme heat 2 teh point wer Raw Fud held by dem wil b cooked 2 perfection!
Guess they're useful 4 SUMTHIN at least..!
aspect.aspects.infernal.might_of_the_fir: Fier seems 2 b completely harmless 2 dem, in fact, it akshully empowers dere damij furthr! Howevr nt bein On Fier slows dere attacks down!! omg
aspect.aspects.infernal.too_hot.descript:
Dey become supr heated wile On Fier, attackin dem wil set dere attackers On Fier too!
They cn abuse dis 2 set themselves On Fier 2 if dey attack On Fier creatures as well!
aspect.aspects.merling.aqua_affinity.des: Dey naturally ignore minin penalties wile underwatr, but struggle 2 mine effectively wit owt watr unless dey haz an Aqua Affinity enchantment!
aspect.aspects.merling.description: Watr attuned an ready 2 explore teh deep unknowns. Known 2 b territorial an vry persistent!!! lol
aspect.aspects.merling.finned_legs.descr: Dere legs r adapted 4 swift movement in watr, drastically increasin swim speed at teh cost ov reduced movement an attack speed on land, unless it's rainin!! omg
aspect.aspects.merling.fish_eyes.descrip: Dere eyes r extremely gud at seein things in teh drak or watr, but require 2 b submerged in watr on a regular basis!!! lol
%1$s prove 2 haz gr8 synergy wit dem, allowin 4 noes negative minin speed penalties wile mountin %1$s!
aspect.aspects.merling.trident_mastery.d:
Tridents r dere weapon ov choice.
The Impalin enchantment provides additional damij 2 awl targets, functionin similarly 2 teh Sharpness enchantment along wit Impaling's base effect!
aspect.aspects.rascal.cave_attuned.descr: Dey r smallr in size, allowin dem 2 squeeze in2 tight spaces, but dis comes at teh cost ov reduced helth an a shortr effective attack range. Howevr, dey r exceptionally gud at minin blocks frum a distance!
aspect.aspects.rascal.description: Spawn ov Teh Underground, perfected 2 b one wit darkness, but nt as mush wit teh lite..!!! lolz!! can has moar?
aspect.aspects.rascal.photosensitive.des: Wen exposed 2 sunlight, dey move noticeably slowr, deal significantly les damij, mine moar slowly, an attack les quickly!! lolz
Within teh darkness, dey cn reach dere fullest potential, wit nite vision.
While in drak spaces, dey move mush fastr, deal slightly moar damij, mine somewhat fastr, an attack a bit quickr!
aspect.aspects.rotten.aggravated.descrip: Unprovoked dey hesitate attackin defenceless creatures, but if dey haz an agressor, dey wil nt hesitate as mush. Furthermore, dey alert nearby summoned %s if attacked!
aspect.aspects.rotten.description: Undead an rotten 2 teh core, dey command %s an cause confusion among dere hivemind!! omg
aspect.aspects.rotten.sunlight_sensitivi: Wile teh sun doesn't directly burn dem, it makes dere fysical attacks hurt les!!! lolz!! can has moar?
aspect.aspects.rotten.undead.description: They've embraced ded an haz parted wit teh requirement ov air an gainin natural armor. Howevr dis leads dem 2 bein vulnerable 2 teh %s Enchantment, along wit bein slowr in watr!
aspect.aspects.shulk.description: Often regarded as annoyin little pests by teh masses, they're capable ov hidin an entire chest's worth ov items, an themselves..!
aspect.aspects.shulk.febile_limbs.descri:
Smal limbs cn onlee duz so much.
They duz les damij, knockback an haz reduced reach, but dere fast attacks cn detr would-be attackers!
aspect.aspects.shulk.shell.description:
Dey stil haz dere shell, somewhat.
Gains absorpshun hearts aftr nt takin damij 4 a wile!! lolz
aspect.aspects.shulk.small_footprint.des: Dey r tiny in size an easy 2 pwn due 2 dere low helth!

dialog.aspects.custom_items.aspect_focus:
Azpect Focuses haz meny difrent versions per each Azpect (minus %s) thus haz meny difrent uses based on wut aspect version it is

The recipe iz also version dependent so plz check owt teh Recipe Book wen craftin at a Craftin Table!! lol
dialog.aspects.custom_items.essence_cage: Check owt %s on how 2 create dis item

%1$s stores an Azpect witch wen consumed makes u dat Azpect.

%1$s cn b used 2 taek owt stored Azpects, returnin it in2 a normal %2$s!
Check owt %s on how 2 uze Essenss 4 dis purpose

%1$s iz used 2 store Essenss.
Unlike a normal %2$s, dis cage duz nt create eny Azpect an cn b used 2 store an infinite amount ov eny Essenss.

%1$s cn stil b used 2 taek owt stored Essenss an evn apply a Whitelist Filtr 2 allow onlee specific Essenss 2 b stored.

This item iz nt used 4 progression, it's onlee a trofy!! lol
Check owt %s on how 2 uze Essenss 4 dis purpose

%1$s iz used 2 store Essenss witch cn b used 2 create an %2$s dat stores an Azpect

%1$s cn b used 2 taek owt stored Essenss an evn apply a Whitelist Filtr 2 allow onlee specific Essenss 2 b stored!
dialog.aspects.custom_items.evergrowing_: Check owt %s on how 2 evolve dis item
Check owt %s on how Essenss work

%1$s extracts Essenss frum Essens-Bearing mobs wen dey r killed wit teh blade.
Each mob onlee contains one set ov Essenss, so attemptin 2 extract multiple times wil fail.

The %1$s cn evolve up 2 Lvl %2$s. As it evolves, it deals increased damij 2 Enchantment-Vulnerable Azpects an Essens-Bearing mobs.

Evolution upgrades teh %3$s enchantment an adds additional enchantments: %4$s an %5$s.

Upon teh first evolushun, teh %1$s haz a %6$s%% chance 2 gain %7$s and/or %8$s. Dese enchantments increase in strength wen teh blade reaches full evolution.

When collectin Essenss frum Azpect-Bearing entities in2 an %9$s usin dis weapon, dere Azpect iz stored directly instead, creatin an %10$s!!! lol
Wen a Plyr wit an active Azpect decides 2 switch 2 anuther one, dey wil b rewarded wit a unique item ov dere nao replaced Azpect.
It's wut remains ov dere old Azpect, a slowly fadin memory dat iz fulfilled.

This item iz nt used 4 progression, it's onlee a trofy!! lolz
dialog.aspects.custom_items.relic.shatte:
Wen a Plyr wit an active Azpect dies 2 anuther Plyr, dey wil leev behind a unique item ov dere Azpect.
It's an Azpect wit itz host vanquished, shattered an unfulfilled.

This item iz nt used 4 progression, it's onlee a trofy!!! lolz!! can has moar?

Evolution Thresholds goes as follows: %3$s!
dialog.aspects.enchantments.water_ward.a:
Increases teh delay watr damij iz delayed by %1$s seconds (max ov %2$s)
Provides a %3$s%% (max ov %4$s%%) chance 2 ignore item damij wen delayin watr damij!! lolz
dialog.aspects.enchantments.water_ward.d:
Wen exposed 2 watr dis Enchantment delays damij frum watr 4 %s seconds
While it iz delayin watr damij it wil damij teh enchanted item instead
Has noes effect on consumed watr items!!! lol
dialog.aspects.essences.explanation.awak: Wen teh %1$s contains at least %2$s Essenss ov certain Azpect Essens combinashuns (c each Azpect's page), teh cage wil become an %3$s witch wil noes longr contain essences, but a matchin Azpect, ready 2 b used!! omg

4 example, %1$s requires %2$s witch wil maek teh %3$s ov %4$s
But %5$s requires %6$s an %7$s witch wil maek teh %8$s ov %9$s!
dialog.aspects.essences.explanation.how_: 2 start collectin Essenss u ned teh followin items:
Once an %s iz awakened u can nt store moar essences in2 it or override it if u gotz teh wrong Azpect, howevr u cn empty teh cage by usin it in ur mainhand wile sneakin!
%1$s iz used 2 store teh Essenss frum mobs killed by teh %2$s as dey r nt simply items u cn hold an require dat special containr!
dialog.aspects.essences.explanation.what:
Evry mob haz up 2 3 Essenss associated wit dem an each mob cn giv difrent amounts ov doze essences dependin how rare dey are.

Essenss contain mobs fysical attributes 2 b forged in2 sumthin nu!!! lol
dialog.aspects.essences.list.apex: Essenss ov beg bads ov dere respective locashuns, sum may evn kall dem Bosses or Mini-Bosses. Dey represent unmatched powr an standin!
dialog.aspects.essences.list.aquatic: Essenss ov water-dwelling or moisture-dependent creatures. Often found in mobs dat thrive in aquatic environments or require watr 2 survive!! lol
dialog.aspects.essences.list.beast: Essenss ov strong, animalistic creatures. Dese embody raw fysicality an instinct!
dialog.aspects.essences.list.bug: Essenss ov insect-like or arthropod creatures. Smal, resilient, an often numerous, dey represent adaptability an persistence!
dialog.aspects.essences.list.dark: Essenss ov creatures attuned 2 darkness or shadow. Dese beings often thrive in low lite an possess mysterious or sinistr qualities!
dialog.aspects.essences.list.ethereal: Essenss ov spectral or otherworldly beings. Nearly intangible an vry elusive!
dialog.aspects.essences.list.feline: Essenss ov cat-like creatures. Agile, quick, an predatory, dey embody grace an sharp instincts!
dialog.aspects.essences.list.fire: Essenss ov creatures attuned 2 heat or flame. Dese beings r often resistant 2 fier an embody destructive energy!! kthxbai
dialog.aspects.essences.list.flying: Essenss ov airborne creatures. Masters ov teh ski, dey represent freedom, speed, an agility!!! lol
dialog.aspects.essences.list.header:
Dis list contains awl Essenss an dere descriptions
Remember dat each mob haz up 2 3 Essenss an each mob based on rarity cn privide moar or les Essenss per type den others!
dialog.aspects.essences.list.humanoid: Essenss ov human-like beings. Defined by intelligence, adaptability, an social structure!!! lol
dialog.aspects.essences.list.ice: Essenss ov cold-adapted creatures. Dey thrive in freezin environments an often wield teh powr ov frost!
dialog.aspects.essences.list.normal: Essenss ov ordinary, unremarkable creatures. Balanced an common!
dialog.aspects.essences.list.ooze: Essenss ov amorfous, gelatinous beings. Flexible an resilient!
dialog.aspects.essences.list.plant: Essenss ov plant-based or nature-attuned creatures. Dey embody growth, resilience, an teh cycles ov nature!
dialog.aspects.essences.list.steel: Essenss ov tough, armored creatures. Durable an strong, dey r often resistant 2 harm or tough 2 pwn!! kthxbai
dialog.aspects.essences.list.undead: Essenss ov creatures dat defy ded. Dese beings r sustained by unnatural forces an often resist conventional harm!!! lol
dialog.aspects.essences.list.void: Essenss ov beings connected 2 Teh End or uther similar dimensions. Alien an mysterious, dey possess strange powers!! lolz
dialog.aspects.essences.list.wild: Essenss ov untamed, feral creatures. Dey embody teh spirit ov teh wilderness!! lolz
